I found your Dentist Appointment (id: 5) on 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00 at Downtown Dental Clinic. Do you want me to reschedule that one?

If so, please tell me one of the following:
- The exact new date and start time (I will keep the 1‑hour duration unless you tell me otherwise), or
- A preferred date range or deadline (e.g., “any morning next week”), and I can propose available times from your calendar.

If you’d like, I can also pick three suitable options and ask you to choose — which do you prefer?
